description: Perform a crystallographic B-factor analysis of E. coli adenylate kinase (apo form, PDB:4AKE) to identify the most flexible regions of the enzyme. Color the structure by B-factor, generate a publication-quality figure, and write a report listing the top 5 most flexible residues with their B-factor values and the structural domain they belong to. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/adk_bfactor.png and the report to ~/PyMOL_Data/adk_flexibility_report.txt.
